FloorScenario: Supervisor picks up the alert. No role gate — anyone with dashboard access can start review.
False signal, boundary sample OK. Record kept for trending.
Reviewer populates DefectTypeId, SeverityRatingId, FamiliarityCode. This is the decision gate.
Known + Minor: scrap/rework/adjust and move on. ResolutionActionCode + notes recorded. No NCR needed.
Known+Major or Unknown. Creates linked NCR in Draft. NCR inherits DefectTypeId, SeverityRatingId.
Root cause is process not product. Creates linked ProcDev in Open.
Confirmed in error. Higher role required.
Skip review for obvious defects (manager authority only).
Confirmation was wrong — need to reassess. Backward transition.
